since_last: 69% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.30%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC -0.05% · Gold +0.11% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 69% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.30%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.30%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.66%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +5.11%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +5.11%, MU +4.63%, BABA +3.38%, AMD +3.34%, TER +3.30%. Laggards: SAP -1.92%, NOW -1.50%, CRM -1.48%, INTU -1.31%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.84% at $125.03
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.84% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
